sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM BANKDB.THKIPB110 WHERE GROUP_CO_CD = #groupCoCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD = #corpClctGroupCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD = #corpClctRegiCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CP_STGE_DSTCD = #corpCpStgeDstcd:VARCHAR#

/* TODO: [변환 불가] QIPA307 SQLIO 소스 미확보 - 주채무계열여부 조회 테이블 미상 */ /* 업무담당자 확인 후 실제 SQL로 교체 필요 */ SELECT MAIN_DEBT_AFFLT_YN FROM BANKDB.THKIPB110 WHERE GROUP_CO_CD = #groupCoCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD = #corpClctGroupCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD = #corpClctRegiCd:VARCHAR#
sqlMap.insert: /* TODO: [검토 필요] TRIPB110 카피북 미확보 - 컬럼 목록 COBOL 소스 기반 역설계 */ INSERT INTO BANKDB.THKIPB110 ( GROUP_CO_CD , CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD , CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD , VALUA_YMD , CORP_CLCT_NAME , MAIN_DEBT_AFFLT_YN , CORP_C_VALUA_DSTCD , VALUA_DEFINS_YMD , VALUA_BASE_YMD , CORP_CP_STGE_DSTCD , GRD_ADJS_DSTCD , ADJS_STGE_NO_DSTCD , STABL_IF_CMPTN_VAL1 , STABL_IF_CMPTN_VAL2 , ERN_IF_CMPTN_VAL1 , ERN_IF_CMPTN_VAL2 , CSFW_FNAF_CMPTN_VAL , FNAF_SCOR , NON_FNAF_SCOR , CHSN_SCOR , SPARE_C_GRD_DSTCD , LAST_CLCT_GRD_DSTCD , VALD_YMD , VALUA_EMPID , VALUA_EMNM , VALUA_BRNCD , MGT_BRNCD ) VALUES ( #groupCoCd:VARCHAR# , #corpClctGroupCd:VARCHAR# , #corpClctRegiCd:VARCHAR# , #valuaYmd:VARCHAR# , #corpClctName:VARCHAR# , #mainDebtAffltYn:VARCHAR# , #corpCValuaDstcd:VARCHAR# , #valuaDefinsYmd:VARCHAR# , #valuaBaseYmd:VARCHAR# , #corpCpStgeDstcd:VARCHAR# , #grdAdjsDstcd:VARCHAR# , #adjsStgeNoDstcd:VARCHAR# , #stablIfCmptnVal1:NUMERIC# , #stablIfCmptnVal2:NUMERIC# , #ernIfCmptnVal1:NUMERIC# , #ernIfCmptnVal2:NUMERIC# , #csfwFnafCmptnVal:NUMERIC# , #fnafScor:NUMERIC# , #nonFnafScor:NUMERIC# , #chsnScor:NUMERIC# , #spareCGrdDstcd:VARCHAR# , #lastClctGrdDstcd:VARCHAR# , #valdYmd:VARCHAR# , #valuaEmpid:VARCHAR# , #valuaEmnm:VARCHAR# , #valuaBrncd:VARCHAR# , #mgtBrncd:VARCHAR# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT GROUP_CO_CD , CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD , CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD , VALUA_YMD FROM BANKDB.THKIPB110 WHERE GROUP_CO_CD = #groupCoCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD = #corpClctGroupCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD = #corpClctRegiCd:VARCHAR# AND VALUA_YMD = #valuaYmd:VARCHAR# FOR UPDATE
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM BANKDB.THKIPB110 WHERE GROUP_CO_CD = #groupCoCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD = #corpClctGroupCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD = #corpClctRegiCd:VARCHAR# AND VALUA_YMD = #valuaYmd:VARCHAR#
sqlMap.select: /* TODO: [검토 필요] TKIPB111 PK 컬럼 목록 COBOL 소스 기반 역설계 */ SELECT GROUP_CO_CD , CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD , CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD , VALUA_YMD , CORP_HSTRY_DSTCD , SERNO FROM BANKDB.THKIPB111 WHERE GROUP_CO_CD = #groupCoCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD = #corpClctGroupCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD = #corpClctRegiCd:VARCHAR# AND VALUA_YMD = #valuaYmd:VARCHAR# ORDER BY SERNO FOR UPDATE
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM BANKDB.THKIPB111 WHERE GROUP_CO_CD = #groupCoCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD = #corpClctGroupCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD = #corpClctRegiCd:VARCHAR# AND VALUA_YMD = #valuaYmd:VARCHAR# AND SERNO = #serno:NUMERIC#

sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM BANKDB.THKIPB116 WHERE GROUP_CO_CD = #groupCoCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD = #corpClctGroupCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD = #corpClctRegiCd:VARCHAR# AND VALUA_YMD = #valuaYmd:VARCHAR# AND SERNO = #serno:NUMERIC#
sqlMap.select: /* TODO: [변환 불가] SQLIO QIPA303 소스 미확보 - THKIPB113 조회 SQL 역설계 */ SELECT GROUP_CO_CD , CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD , CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD , VALUA_YMD , FNAF_A_RPTDOC_DSTCD AS fnafARptdocDstcd , FNAF_ITEM_CD AS fnafItemCd , BIZ_SECT_NO AS bizSectNo FROM BANKDB.THKIPB113 WHERE GROUP_CO_CD = #groupCoCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD = #corpClctGroupCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD = #corpClctRegiCd:VARCHAR# AND VALUA_YMD = #valuaYmd:VARCHAR#

sqlMap.select: /* TODO: [변환 불가] SQLIO QIPA304 소스 미확보 - THKIPB112 조회 SQL 역설계 */ SELECT GROUP_CO_CD , CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD , CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD , VALUA_YMD , ANLS_I_CLSFI_DSTCD AS anlsIClsfiDstcd , FNAF_A_RPTDOC_DSTCD AS fnafARptdocDstcd , FNAF_ITEM_CD AS fnafItemCd FROM BANKDB.THKIPB112 WHERE GROUP_CO_CD = #groupCoCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_GROUP_CD = #corpClctGroupCd:VARCHAR# AND CORP_CLCT_REGI_CD = #corpClctRegiCd:VARCHAR# AND VALUA_YMD = #valuaYmd:VARCHAR#
